upload.processingError: Failed to process the media file. Please try again.
upload.uploadError: Failed to upload the file. Please try again.
upload.numSpeakersHelp: Select the number of speakers in the audio file, or choose auto-detection
upload.audioWillBeExtracted: Audio will be extracted for transcription
upload.unsupportedFileTypeDescription: Allowed file types: mp3, mp4, m4a, flac, wav, webm. If you need support for other file types, please contact us through the feedback button.
upload.fileTooLargeDescription: The file size exceeds the maximum allowed limit of 500MB. Please try a smaller file.
upload.tooManyRequestsDescription: You've made too many requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
upload.audioLanguageHelp: What language was spoken in the audio file? If you are not sure, select 'Auto detection'.
upload.settingsInfo: These settings help improve transcription accuracy. You can leave both on auto-detection if you're unsure.

index.title: Transcribo
index.subtitle: Transcribe your audio and video files with AI and automatically generate summaries. 96 languages and audio files up to 2 hours supported.
index.uploadDescription: Upload your audio or video files
index.recordDescription: Record audio directly from your microphone
index.feature1Description: AI-powered transcription with high accuracy and speed
index.feature2Description: Support for various languages and dialects
index.feature3Description: Your data is processed securely and privately
index.experimental: The recording feature is experimental and only tested with short recordings. It may not work for recordings longer than 5 minutes. For longer recordings we recommend using the file upload.

audioRecorder.makeSureMicrophoneIsProperlyConnected: Make sure your microphone is properly connected
audioRecorder.checkBrowserPermissionsForMicrophoneAcce: Check browser permissions for microphone access
audioRecorder.restartDeviceIfIssuePersists: Restart your device if the issue persists

taskStatus.failedDescription: Something went wrong during the transcription process. Please try again with a different file.

transcription.applySpeakerChanges: Do you want to apply your changes?
transcription.notFound: Transcription not found or failed to load

delete.title: Delete Transcription
delete.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this transcription?

ui.saveChangesHint: Leave text field or press Enter to save changes

emptyState.title: No data found
emptyState.description: There is no data available to display.

types.kurzprotokollDesc: Brief summary of key points and decisions
types.ergebnisprotokollDesc: Focus exclusively on outcomes, decisions, and action items
types.verhandlungsprotokollDesc: Detailed protocol with discussions and reasoning

errors.noMediaFile: No media file found for task
errors.failedToCreateTranscription: Failed to create transcription from results

help.title: Help Guide - Transcribo
help.description: Application help and keyboard shortcuts guide

mediaControls.title: Basic Media Controls
mediaControls.spacebar: Press {space} to play/pause the video or audio
mediaControls.spectrogramClick: Click or drag on the {spectrogram} to seek to a specific position
mediaControls.arrowKeys: Use {leftKey} or {rightKey} to seek 5 seconds back or forward
mediaControls.mouseWheel: Use mouse wheel to zoom into the {timeline}, or use the range slider below
mediaControls.ctrlClick: Use {ctrlKey} + left click to move around the {timeline}

segments.title: Transcription Segments
segments.intro: At the bottom, the current {transcriptionSegment} is shown for editing:
segments.speaker: In the {dropdown}, assign a speaker (type in the search box to create a new speaker)
segments.timeChange: Change the time in seconds in the {timespanTextFields}
segments.seekTime: Click on the timestamps to seek to that time
segments.insertBefore: Press the button with the arrow up {insertAbove} to insert a segment before
segments.insertAfter: Press the button with the arrow down {insertBelow} to insert a segment below
segments.deleteSegment: Press the delete button {delete} to remove the segment

timeline.title: Working with Segments on Timeline
timeline.hoverText: Hover over a rectangle to see the text
timeline.clickSelect: Click on a rectangle to select it and see the handles
timeline.moveWithKeys: When selected, you can move the rectangle 0.5 seconds to the left or right with the arrow keys
timeline.dragMove: Drag the rectangle to move it
timeline.resizeHandles: Drag the handles on the left or right side to resize the rectangle
timeline.altSnap: Hold the {altKey} key while moving to prevent snapping to other rectangles

editing.title: Editing Operations
editing.buttons: Or press the undo/redo buttons at the top left

processing.title: Transcriptions in Progress
processing.description: Monitor the status of your transcription tasks
processing.noTasksDescription: There are no transcriptions currently in progress

transcriptionList.title: Your Transcriptions
transcriptionList.description: Here you can see all your transcribed files

retention.title: Availability of Transcriptions
retention.description: Transcriptions older than {retentionDays} days are automatically deleted.

welcome.title: Welcome to Transcribo!
welcome.description: Transcribo is an AI-powered transcription service that helps you transcribe audio and video files. All data is processed on local servers of IT BS. You can also process special personal data and data subject to official secrecy (increased protection requirements) with Transcribo. I will now show you the main features of Transcribo.

transcriptionInfo.title: Transcription Info
transcriptionInfo.description: Click here to view and change the transcription name, or download the original media file.

exportToolbar.title: Export
exportToolbar.description: Click here to export your transcription. You can choose between text, subtitle (SRT), JSON, or Word (DOCX) formats.

modes.title: The Four Modes
modes.description:
Viewer: View and read your transcription

Summary: Generate AI-powered summaries

Editor: Edit text, timestamps, and speakers

Statistics: See speaking time distribution

viewerIntro.title: Viewer Mode
viewerIntro.description: In Viewer mode, you can read your transcription.

viewerDisplayOptions.title: Display Options
viewerDisplayOptions.description: Use the display options to show/hide speakers, timestamps, or merge consecutive segments from the speaker.

summary.title: Summary Mode
summary.description: Switch to Summary mode to generate an AI-powered summary of your transcription.

generateSummary.title: Generate Summary
generateSummary.description: Click this button to generate a summary. Choose between short protocol, results protocol, or detailed negotiation protocol.

statistics.title: Statistics Mode
statistics.description: Switch to Statistics mode to see the speaking time distribution by speaker.

speakerStatistics.title: Speaker Statistics
speakerStatistics.description: View the total audio duration, speaking time, speech ratio, and how much each speaker contributed.

editor.title: Editor Mode
editor.description: Switch to Editor mode to make changes to your transcription. You can edit text, timestamps, and speaker names here.

speakerNames.title: Rename Speakers
speakerNames.description: Here you can rename the speakers. Just type a new name and it will be applied to all segments from this speaker.

editTranscriptions.title: Edit Transcriptions
editTranscriptions.description: Each segment can be edited: change the text, update the speaker, or modify the start and end times. Click the timestamps to jump to that position.

addTranscription.title: Add New Transcriptions
addTranscription.description: Click the + button to add new transcription segments at any position.

mediaPlayback.title: Media Playback
mediaPlayback.description: Use the media bar to play your audio or video.

mediaExpand.title: Expand Media View
mediaExpand.description: Click the expand button to see the video/larger view with subtitle preview.

helpButton.title: Help Button
helpButton.description: Click this button anytime to restart this tour.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.description: You're ready to use Transcribo! Click the help button anytime to see this tour again.
